esv_version: Know that the LORD, he is God! It is he who made us, and we are his.
niv_version: Know that the LORD is God. It is he who made us, and we are his.
reflection: God made you and me, and we belong to Him. That makes you very special and safe in His family. He is happy you are His.
live_it_out:
1. Look in the mirror and say "God made me and I am His!"
2. Draw a picture of something God made.
3. Thank God for making you part of His family.

esv_version: Blessed be the Lord, who daily bears us up.
niv_version: Praise be to the Lord, to God our Savior, who daily bears our burdens.
reflection: Every single day God carries you when things feel heavy. He never gets tired of helping you. You can rest in His strong arms.
live_it_out:
1. When something feels heavy, say "God, carry me."
2. Take a deep breath and feel lighter.
3. Thank Him for carrying you today.

esv_version: My times are in your hand.
niv_version: My times are in your hands.
reflection: Your whole day and your whole life are safely held in God’s hands. He plans good things for you. You can trust His timing.
live_it_out:
1. Say "My day is in Your hands, God."
2. Do your best and let God handle the rest.
3. Feel safe knowing He holds your time.

esv_version: Keep your heart with all vigilance.
niv_version: Above all else, guard your heart.
reflection: Your heart is very special, so God asks you to keep it safe and full of good things. He helps you choose what goes inside.
live_it_out:
1. Think happy and kind thoughts today.
2. Say no to mean words or pictures.
3. Ask God to help guard your heart.

esv_version: Great peace have those who love your law.
niv_version: Great peace have those who love your law.
reflection: When you love God’s words, He gives you a big, calm peace inside. It feels like a quiet river in your heart.
live_it_out:
1. Listen to one Bible story today.
2. Feel the peaceful feeling it brings.
3. Tell God you love His words.

esv_version: I have set the LORD always before me.
niv_version: I keep my eyes always on the LORD.
reflection: Keeping your eyes on God is like looking at the best friend who never leaves. He stays right with you all day.
live_it_out:
1. Picture God walking beside you.
2. Say His name quietly sometimes.
3. Feel happy He is always near.

esv_version: Cast your burden on the LORD, and he will sustain you.
niv_version: Cast your cares on the LORD and he will sustain you.
reflection: You can hand all your worries to God like giving Him a heavy backpack. He carries it and takes care of you.
live_it_out:
1. Pretend to hand your worries to God.
2. Say "I give this to You, God."
3. Feel lighter and happier.

esv_version: He is my refuge and my fortress, my God, in whom I trust.
niv_version: He is my refuge and my fortress, my God, in whom I trust.
reflection: God is like the strongest safe place and the biggest castle. You can run to Him and feel completely safe.
live_it_out:
1. Say "You are my safe place, God."
2. Imagine running into His arms.
3. Trust Him when you feel scared.

esv_version: The LORD is on my side; I will not fear.
niv_version: The LORD is with me; I will not be afraid.
reflection: God is right on your team, holding your hand. Because He is with you, fear doesn’t have to win.
live_it_out:
1. Say "God is with me, I will not fear."
2. Stand tall and feel brave.
3. Tell a friend God is on your side.

esv_version: In the fear of the LORD one has strong confidence.
niv_version: Whoever fears the LORD has a secure fortress.
reflection: Respecting and loving God gives you strong confidence. It’s like having the safest fortress around your heart.
live_it_out:
1. Show God respect with a quiet "I love You."
2. Feel strong and safe inside.
3. Walk with your head held high.

esv_version: The LORD will keep your going out and your coming in.
niv_version: The LORD will watch over your coming and going.
reflection: God watches over every time you go out to play and every time you come home. He never stops caring.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Watch over me, God" when you leave home.
2. Feel safe wherever you go.
3. Thank Him when you come back.

esv_version: Do not be anxious about tomorrow.
niv_version: Do not worry about tomorrow.
reflection: God takes care of today, so you don’t have to worry about tomorrow. He has good plans for every day.
live_it_out:
1. When you worry about tomorrow, say "God has today."
2. Enjoy the happy things right now.
3. Trust Him with tomorrow.

esv_version: O LORD, in the morning you hear my voice.
niv_version: In the morning, LORD, you hear my voice.
reflection: Every morning God listens when you talk to Him. He loves your morning hello more than anything.
live_it_out:
1. Say good morning to God first thing.
2. Tell Him one thing you hope for today.
3. Smile knowing He heard you.

esv_version: Commit your work to the LORD.
niv_version: Commit to the LORD whatever you do.
reflection: When you give your work or play to God, He makes it turn out beautifully. He helps you do your best.
live_it_out:
1. Before you start something, say "This is for You, God."
2. Do it with a happy heart.
3. Thank Him when you finish.

esv_version: For you, O Lord, are good and forgiving.
niv_version: You, Lord, are forgiving and good.
reflection: God is good and always ready to forgive when you say sorry. His forgiveness feels like a fresh start.
live_it_out:
1. If you make a mistake, say sorry to God.
2. Feel His gentle forgiveness.
3. Forgive someone else with a smile.

esv_version: Make me to know your ways, O LORD.
niv_version: Show me your ways, LORD.
reflection: God loves to show you the right way to go. He teaches you gently, one step at a time.
live_it_out:
1. Ask God "Show me Your way today."
2. Listen for His gentle voice.
3. Follow one kind thing He shows you.

esv_version: In quietness and in trust shall be your strength.
niv_version: In quietness and trust is your strength.
reflection: Being quiet and trusting God gives you real strength. It’s like a secret superpower from Him.
live_it_out:
1. Sit quietly for one minute with God.
2. Whisper "I trust You."
3. Feel strong inside.

esv_version: Joy comes with the morning.
niv_version: Joy comes in the morning.
reflection: Even after a hard night, God brings joy when morning comes. His joy is like sunshine in your heart.
live_it_out:
1. Wake up and say "Joy comes today!"
2. Look for something happy this morning.
3. Share your joy with someone.

esv_version: When you lie down, your sleep will be sweet.
niv_version: When you lie down, your sleep will be sweet.
reflection: God makes your bedtime peaceful and your sleep sweet. He watches over you all night long.
live_it_out:
1. Say a bedtime prayer thanking God.
2. Think of one happy thing before sleep.
3. Feel safe and cozy in His care.

esv_version: Teach me to do your will.
niv_version: Teach me to do your will.
reflection: God is the best teacher and He loves showing you what makes Him happy. You can learn from Him every day.
live_it_out:
1. Ask God "Teach me what You like."
2. Do one thing you think pleases Him.
3. Say thank you for His teaching.

esv_version: Your hands have made and fashioned me.
niv_version: Your hands made me and formed me.
reflection: God’s own hands made you and shaped you with love. You are His beautiful creation.
live_it_out:
1. Hold your hands out and say "God made me."
2. Thank Him for your body and heart.
3. Feel special because He formed you.

esv_version: The LORD is my strength and my shield.
niv_version: The LORD is my strength and my shield.
reflection: God gives you strength and protects you like a strong shield. You can feel safe and brave.
live_it_out:
1. Say "You are my strength and shield, God."
2. Stand tall like you have a shield.
3. Thank Him for protecting you.

esv_version: See what kind of love the Father has given to us.
niv_version: See what great love the Father has lavished on us.
reflection: God’s love for you is huge and wonderful. He calls you His very own child. That is the best love ever.
live_it_out:
1. Say "God loves me like His child!"
2. Give yourself a gentle hug.
3. Share His love with one person.

esv_version: Hope in God.
niv_version: Put your hope in God.
reflection: When you put your hope in God, your heart feels light and full of good things coming. He never disappoints.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I put my hope in You, God."
2. Think of one good thing you hope for.
3. Feel happy because of Him.

esv_version: Because your steadfast love is better than life.
niv_version: Because your love is better than life.
reflection: God’s love is even better than anything else in the whole world. It makes life beautiful.
live_it_out:
1. Say "Your love is the best, God."
2. Think of how much He loves you.
3. Thank Him for His wonderful love.

esv_version: You are my hiding place and my shield.
niv_version: You are my refuge and my shield.
reflection: God is the safest hiding place when you need to feel protected. He covers you like a warm, strong shield.
live_it_out:
1. Pretend to hide in God’s arms.
2. Say "You are my safe place."
3. Feel calm and protected.

esv_version: The LORD is near to all who call on him.
niv_version: The LORD is near to all who call on him.
reflection: Whenever you call on God, He comes close right away. He loves hearing your voice.
live_it_out:
1. Call on God anytime with a simple prayer.
2. Feel how near He is.
3. Say thank you for His closeness.

esv_version: The LORD is my rock and my fortress and my deliverer.
niv_version: The LORD is my rock, my fortress and my deliverer.
reflection: God is strong like a rock, safe like a fortress, and always rescues you. You can lean on Him completely.
live_it_out:
1. Say "You are my rock, God!"
2. Stand on one foot and feel steady in Him.
3. Thank Him for being your safe place.

esv_version: Oh, taste and see that the LORD is good!
niv_version: Taste and see that the LORD is good.
reflection: God is good in every way. When you look for His goodness, you will find it everywhere.
live_it_out:
1. Notice one good thing God did today.
2. Say "God is good!" with a big smile.
3. Share something good with a friend.

esv_version: Be still, and know that I am God.
niv_version: Be still, and know that I am God.
reflection: In the busy day, God invites you to be still for a little while. He is right there, and that is enough.
live_it_out:
1. Sit quietly for one minute and think of God.
2. Take three slow breaths and say His name.
3. Feel peaceful knowing He is God.
